changeSet.author: lesha226@yandex.ru

rollback.sql: delete from items where title in ('Title 1', 'Title 2', 'Title 3', 'Title 4', 'Title 5')

changeSet.sql: insert into items(title, description, img_path, price) with src as ( values ('Title 1', 'Some description 1. (Liquibase)', 'images/1.jpeg', 1), ('Title 2', 'Some description 2', 'images/2.jpeg', 2), ('Title 3', 'Some description 3', 'images/3.jpeg', 3), ('Title 4', 'Some description 4', 'images/4.jpeg', 4), ('Title 5', 'Some description 5', 'images/5.jpeg', 5) ) select * from src where not exists(select 1 from items);
